title: Algorithmic Decision-Making Flow: Identifying Ethical Risks
description: This flowchart illustrates the lifecycle of an algorithmic system, highlighting key points where ethical issues can emerge from data input to final outcome, and the feedback mechanisms necessary for accountability.
relationships: Data flows into Algorithm which produces a Decision Output
Decision Output leads to a Real-World Impact
Real-World Impact and Decision Output are monitored by Feedback & Oversight Mechanisms
Feedback & Oversight Mechanisms can correct and refine the Data and Algorithm stages
